summary: Sole instructor for the undergraduate Asphalt Materials course at UIUC's Grainger College of Engineering. Developed and delivered lectures, laboratory sessions, and design problem modules grounded in real-world DOT datasets and contemporary infrastructure challenges. Emphasized hands-on laboratory experience and project-based learning to build both technical competence and analytical confidence.

Teaching assistant for the core undergraduate Transportation Engineering course. Led discussion sections, office hours, and laboratory demonstrations. Supported students through analytical problem sets, design exercises, and research-informed case studies connecting course theory to current IDOT and FHWA practice.
